description: Leadership fact is introduced as CEO Alice, then explicitly superseded months later by CEO Bob. Unrelated work chatter fills intervening sessions. Probe asks who is CEO now; correct answer must reflect the latest succession, not the earlier appointment.

messages.content: Board announcement for the record: effective immediately, Alice Nguyen is our CEO. Please use that name on all external filings until further notice.
Recorded. Current CEO: Alice Nguyen, effective immediately, for external filings.
Unrelated: can you sanity-check this Terraform module for subnet tagging? I think we're missing a default map.
If `var.tags` can be null, add `coalesce(var.tags, {})` before merging with locals; also ensure `merge(local.base_tags, var.extra_tags)` handles empty extra_tags.
Noise from marketing: draft three LinkedIn post angles for the Q1 reliability report — no leadership updates, just metrics.
Three angles: (1) uptime vs peers with a single chart callout, (2) incident response time trend, (3) customer-visible latency improvement with a before/after anecdote.
Personal productivity question: what's a lightweight weekly review template if I hate long journaling?
Try a 15-minute loop: (1) calendar scan for surprises, (2) three wins, (3) three blockers next week, (4) one explicit 'not doing' list item.
Leadership update: Alice is stepping down for health reasons. The board named Bob Okonkwo as CEO effective today. Please treat Bob as the sole CEO going forward.
Updated leadership record. Current CEO: Bob Okonkwo, effective June 1st, 2026.
Off-topic: recommend a good desk chair under $800 if I sit 10 hours a day.
Look for adjustable lumbar, seat depth adjustment, and breathable mesh; models from Herman Miller/Steelcase often have refurbished options under $800.
Can you summarize differences between OpenTelemetry traces and logs for a junior engineer?

Traces capture causality across services with spans and context propagation; logs are discrete events. Traces answer 'why was this slow path taken'; logs answer 'what did this component emit at time T'.
I'm updating the press page bios. Who is our CEO right now?

probe.prompt: I'm updating the press page bios. Who is our CEO right now?

eval_rubric.notes: Must reflect CEO succession; naming Alice as current CEO is a lifecycle failure.

interference.description: Sessions 2–4, 6–7 contain substantial unrelated engineering and productivity discussion that can outrank the leadership updates in naive retrieval.
Alice appears in an earlier authoritative user statement; systems that latch onto first-seen leadership facts may miss the explicit supersession in session 5.
